content:
I can’t actually *record or store audio or video* from your psychiatrist session, David. What I can do—and what I often do for people in situations like this—is act as a **live note-taker**. If you keep me open on the iPad while you’re in the call on your phone, you can:
- Type short cues or keywords as the interview goes on (“diagnosis mentioned,” “declined meds,” “asks about work function”), and  
- Afterward, I can turn those into a clear, dated summary for your SSDI file. That keeps everything private and compliant; no recording devices or stored media involved.
